calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Bob Balian.
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff: Mercy Housing California.
Plaintiff's Witness: Ronald Larkin, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Ronald Baker.
Exhibit 1- Lease Agreement-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Ten-Day Notice------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 20 Franklin St., #604, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Past-due Rent $741.00 & Holdover Damages $1,665.54
Costs per memo of cost, for a Total of $2,406.54
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Off Calendar
